base_read.sql: SELECT invoice_num AS INVOICE_NUM, invoice_id AS INVOICE_ID, invoice_amount AS INVOICE_AMOUNT FROM ap_invoices_all WHERE invoice_num LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-APINV-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT h.invoice_num AS INVOICE_NUM, h.invoice_id AS IFACE_INVOICE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(NVL(r.rejection_message, r.reject_lookup_code), '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.reject_lookup_code) FROM ap_interface_rejections r WHERE r.parent_id = h.invoice_id AND r.parent_table = 'AP_INVOICES_INTERFACE') AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM ap_invoices_interface h WHERE h.load_request_id = :LRID
